title: Landtia nervosa

The classification of Landtia nervosa is as follows: kingdom Plantae, clade Angiosperms, clade Eudicots, clade Asterids, order Boraginales, family Boraginaceae, genus Landtia, species L. nervosa. Further research may be necessary to confirm its exact classification and relationships within the plant kingdom.

intro: Landtia nervosa is a plant species native to the Andean region, belonging to the Asteraceae family, traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Landtia nervosa include its potential anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and spasmolytic effects, making it a popular remedy for treating anxiety, insomnia, and muscle spasms. The bioactive constituents of this plant include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its therapeutic properties. Landtia nervosa is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to alleviate stress, promote relaxation, and improve sleep quality.
